description: We are looking for a Senior Frontend Engineer to join our product team at Stripe. You will build and maintain user-facing features for our payment infrastructure used by millions of businesses worldwide. You'll work closely with designers, backend engineers, and product managers to ship high-quality, performant web experiences.
responsibilities: Build scalable, maintainable React components used across Stripe's dashboard
Collaborate with designers to implement pixel-perfect, accessible UIs
Optimize web performance and ensure cross-browser compatibility
Write comprehensive unit and integration tests
Mentor junior engineers and lead frontend architecture decisions
requirements: 4+ years of experience with React and modern JavaScript
Strong understanding of TypeScript and CSS-in-JS patterns
Experience with GraphQL APIs
Familiarity with testing frameworks like Jest and Cypress
Strong eye for UI/UX details and accessibility best practices

description: Figma is hiring a Product Designer who will shape the future of collaborative design tools. You'll own end-to-end design for key product surfaces and work directly with engineering and research teams. This is a rare chance to design the tools that designers use every day.
responsibilities: Own design for one or more product areas from concept to launch
Conduct user research and synthesize findings into design decisions
Create and maintain component libraries within Figma's design system
Present work to stakeholders and gather feedback iteratively
Partner closely with PMs and engineers during implementation
requirements: 3+ years of product design experience at a tech company
Expert-level Figma skills
Strong portfolio demonstrating end-to-end design process
Experience with user research methodologies
Ability to communicate design rationale clearly

description: Join Vercel's platform team and help build the infrastructure that powers millions of deployments every day. You'll work on mission-critical systems that handle global traffic and ensure that developers can ship code with zero friction.
responsibilities: Design and build distributed systems for Vercel's edge network
Improve deployment pipeline reliability and performance
Work on autoscaling and resource management infrastructure
Collaborate with developer experience teams to reduce latency
On-call rotation for platform incidents
requirements: 5+ years of backend engineering experience
Experience with Go or Node.js at scale
Strong understanding of distributed systems and Kubernetes
Experience with PostgreSQL, Redis, or similar databases
Track record of improving system reliability

description: Hugging Face is looking for ML Engineers to advance the state of open-source AI. You'll train and fine-tune large language models, contribute to the Transformers library, and help democratize access to cutting-edge AI for developers worldwide.
responsibilities: Train and fine-tune LLMs on large-scale distributed compute
Optimize model inference for speed and memory efficiency
Contribute open-source improvements to the Transformers library
Collaborate with researchers on novel model architectures
Write technical blog posts and documentation
requirements: 3+ years of ML engineering experience
Deep expertise in PyTorch and the Transformers ecosystem
Experience with CUDA and GPU optimization
Strong Python engineering skills
Contributions to open-source ML projects preferred

description: Linear is building the future of project management and we need an iOS Engineer who cares deeply about craft. You'll own the Linear iOS app used by thousands of engineering teams worldwide, building features that are fast, beautiful, and intuitive.
responsibilities: Build and ship new features in the Linear iOS app
Maintain performance and reliability of the app
Design and implement data sync using Core Data
Collaborate with designers to ensure pixel-perfect UI
Write and maintain unit and UI tests
requirements: 2+ years of iOS development with Swift
Proficiency with SwiftUI and UIKit
Understanding of Core Data or Realm
Strong attention to UI/UX detail
Experience with REST APIs and offline-first design patterns

description: PlanetScale runs a globally distributed MySQL-compatible database platform. We're hiring a DevOps/SRE Engineer to ensure our infrastructure is reliable, scalable, and secure. You'll work on the systems that database engineers depend on every day.
responsibilities: Manage and scale Kubernetes clusters across multiple regions
Build and maintain CI/CD pipelines
Define and improve SLOs and alerting strategies
Automate infrastructure provisioning with Terraform
Respond to and resolve production incidents
requirements: 4+ years of SRE or DevOps experience
Strong expertise in Kubernetes and cloud infrastructure (AWS/GCP)
Experience with Terraform and infrastructure-as-code
Proficiency with observability tools like Prometheus and Grafana
On-call availability and incident management experience

description: Join Notion's engineering team to build the connected workspace that millions rely on for their work and life. As a Full Stack Engineer you'll work across the frontend and backend to ship features that delight users.
responsibilities: Build end-to-end features across web, API, and database layers
Improve app performance and loading speed
Write clean, testable code with thorough code reviews
Collaborate with product, design, and data teams
Help define technical direction for your squad
requirements: 2+ years of full-stack engineering experience
Proficiency in React, Node.js, and TypeScript
Comfort with relational databases like PostgreSQL
Experience deploying on AWS or similar cloud providers
Strong communication and collaboration skills

description: Snowflake is hiring a Data Engineer to build and optimize our internal data platform. You'll work closely with data scientists and analysts to enable self-serve analytics at scale across the organization.
responsibilities: Design and build scalable data pipelines using Spark and Airflow
Maintain and evolve our dbt models and data warehouse schemas
Partner with analytics teams to surface clean, reliable data
Monitor and improve pipeline performance and reliability
Document data lineage and ownership
requirements: 3+ years of data engineering experience
Expert-level SQL and strong Python skills
Hands-on experience with dbt and Airflow
Familiarity with distributed computing (Spark/Flink)
Understanding of data warehouse design principles

description: Cloudflare is hiring a Security Engineer to protect the infrastructure that defends millions of websites from attacks. You'll perform threat modeling, penetration testing, and red team exercises to identify and fix vulnerabilities before adversaries do.
responsibilities: Conduct penetration tests and red team exercises
Perform threat modeling for new products and features
Build internal security tooling and automation
Respond to and investigate security incidents
Stay current on emerging threats and CVEs
requirements: 4+ years of security engineering or pen testing experience
Strong knowledge of network security and attack vectors
Experience with Zero Trust architecture
Proficiency in Python or Rust for tooling
Security certifications (OSCP, CISSP) preferred

description: Shopify is looking for an experienced Engineering Manager to lead a high-performing team building Shopify's merchant-facing products. You'll balance technical depth with people leadership, growing your team while ensuring on-time, high-quality delivery.
responsibilities: Lead and grow a team of 6-10 engineers
Drive technical roadmap and architecture decisions
Run sprint planning, retros, and 1:1s
Collaborate with product and design on strategy
Recruit and hire top engineering talent
requirements: 7+ years of software engineering experience
2+ years of engineering management
Technical depth in web technologies (React, Ruby, or similar)
Strong hiring and coaching experience
Excellent communication with technical and non-technical stakeholders

description: Duolingo's mobile app is used by 500M+ learners worldwide. We need a React Native Engineer to build engaging, gamified learning experiences on iOS and Android. You'll work on features that help people learn new languages every day.
responsibilities: Build new features in the React Native codebase for iOS and Android
Create delightful animations and micro-interactions
Optimize app performance and startup time
Write comprehensive unit and integration tests
Work closely with animators and content teams
requirements: 2+ years of React Native development experience
Strong TypeScript and Redux skills
Experience with React Native Reanimated for animations
Familiarity with native iOS or Android development
Passion for mobile UX and performance

description: Brex is hiring a Backend Engineer to work on our core payments and financial infrastructure. You'll build reliable, high-throughput systems that process billions of dollars in transactions for startups and enterprises.
responsibilities: Build and scale payment processing services in Elixir
Integrate with card networks and banking partners via APIs
Design event-driven systems with Kafka for financial data
Ensure compliance with PCI-DSS and financial regulations
Participate in incident response and on-call rotation
requirements: 3+ years of backend engineering experience
Experience with Elixir, Erlang, or similar functional languages
Understanding of financial systems, payments, or fintech
Comfort with event-driven architectures and message queues
Strong focus on reliability and fault tolerance
